creator: alane@geeksrus.net
text:
If kdebase is built w/o motif, it still puts nsplugin in the list of things
to load in 

/usr/local/share/services/konqueror_config.desktop:Exec=kcmshell kcmkonq
filetypes konqhtml ebrowsing cookies proxy kcmcss crypto useragent nsplugin

Fix: 

Soon.
How-To-Repeat: 
Build kdebase2 w/o motif installed. Do (S)ettings/(C)onfigure Konqueror. 
You'll get an error box about not being able to load nsplugin.
